name: python3-cpe
title: python3-cpe
description:
Common Platform Enumeration for Python (Python 3)
This package contains a Common Platform Enumeration for Python. CPE is a
standardized method of describing and identifying classes of applications,
operating systems, and hardware devices present among an enterprise's
computing assets.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-cpe because Common Platform Enumeration for Python (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-cpe as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-cpe with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-cpe --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
